iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.CfnA: An object that specifies the data type of a property.

iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.Allo.Description: The allowed values for this data type.

iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.Nest.Description: The nested type in the data type.

iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.Rela.Description: A relationship that associates a component with another component.

iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.Type.Description: The underlying type of the data type.  Valid Values: `RELATIONSHIP | STRING | LONG | BOOLEAN | INTEGER | DOUBLE | LIST | MAP`

iottwinmaker.componenttype.datatype.Unit.Description: The unit of measure used in this data type.
